summary: Completed testing of 4 new features for 2good2breal dating profile verification service. All features verified working: (1) Date dropdowns (Day/Month/Year) for date_of_birth, profile_creation_date, last_active on AnalyzePage, (2) Missing fields in Admin print form (Marital Status, University/College, Hobbies/Interests, Year(s) of Attendance), (3) WhatsApp numbers correctly formatted in acceptance email, (4) Photo Identification text in DOCX and AdminReportPage.
passed_tests: Health endpoint returns healthy status
Admin login API works with admin/admin2026 credentials
User login API works with test@test.com/Test1234! credentials
Admin analyses list endpoint returns submissions
DOCX download endpoint returns valid DOCX file
DOCX contains new Photo Identification text: 'Research and confirmation of all Profile Platforms, Locations and Residencies previously and in use today'
DOCX contains Marital Status field
DOCX contains Hobbies/Interests field
DOCX contains University/College field
DOCX contains Year(s) of Attendance field
WhatsApp numbers correctly formatted in server.py: 'WhatsApp 1 : +33 (0) 7 43 66 05 55' and 'WhatsApp 2 : +33 (0) 7 67 92 55 45'
AdminPage.jsx contains all required print fields
AdminReportPage.jsx contains Photo Identification text
Date of Birth dropdown (Day/Month/Year) renders on Step 2 with data-testid selectors
Profile Creation Date dropdown (Day/Month/Year) renders on Step 3
Last communication/meeting dropdown (Day/Month/Year) renders on Step 3
Date dropdowns allow selection of Day (01-31), Month (January-December), Year
Admin dashboard loads and displays submissions list
Submission expansion shows Form Data and AI Analysis sections
Print, PDF, DOCX, Create Report buttons visible in expanded submission
seed_data_creation: Used existing submissions (ron68, Ron68, Ron 68) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent:
All 4 requested features have been implemented and verified: (1) Date dropdowns use shadcn/ui Select components with data-testid attributes (dob-day, dob-month, dob-year, creation-date-day, creation-date-month, creation-date-year, last-active-day, last-active-month, last-active-year), (2) Admin print form includes Marital Status, University/College, Hobbies/Interests, Year(s) of Attendance fields in handlePrint function, (3) WhatsApp numbers in acceptance email at line 3069-3070 show two separate

tags, (4) Photo Identification text added to DOCX generation at lines 1732 and 2201, and to AdminReportPage.jsx at lines 403 and 620.
